value_metric: the 2016+ history backfill is split into 127 small monthly shards that are retryable, resumable, and idempotent -- running a shard any number of times produces no duplicates and an interrupted shard resumes exactly from its last confirmed checkpoint -- so recovering a decade of history can never double-count or lose work

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: planner + cursor semantics + checkpoint schema; not wired to real backfill fetching (that is the adapters + T042 three-lane engine + cloud wiring)
